title: oldenlandia rupestris
intro: Oldenlandia rupestris, also known as rock Oldenlandia or rock weed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a traditional medicinal herb used in various parts of the world, particularly in Asia, for its diverse medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Oldenlandia rupestris can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
